title: Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises!
